description_long: This is a human adult figure equipped with heavy padded protective gear covering the torso, legs, and head, resembling a bomb disposal or riot control suit. The suit features thick, segmented padding on the chest, abdomen, and thighs, with a prominent knee guard on the left leg and reinforced boots. The arms are exposed except for shoulder pads, and the hands are ungloved, revealing articulated fingers. The head is protected by a full helmet with a dark visor, obscuring facial features. The overall appearance suggests a focus on maximum bodily protection while maintaining some mobility, suitable for hazardous urban environments.
description: A heavily padded adult figure in protective gear with a helmet and reinforced boots, designed for hazardous urban scenarios.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full protective suit, helmet, exposed arms, and prominent knee guard on the left leg.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the helmet profile, arm padding, and the thickness of the torso and leg protection.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back padding, helmet, and the asymmetrical placement of the knee guard.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the arm and leg padding, helmet, and the articulated hand.
attribute_clothing_type: full-body protective suit with helmet, padded vest, reinforced pants, and shoulder pads
